# services.victorialogs

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.victorialogs`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.victorialogs.basicAuthPasswordFile` | `null or string` | File that contains the Basic Auth password used to protect VictoriaLogs instance by authorization |
| `services.victorialogs.basicAuthUsername` | `null or string` | Basic Auth username used to protect VictoriaLogs instance by authorization |
| `services.victorialogs.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable VictoriaLogs is an open source user-friendly database for logs from VictoriaMetrics. |
| `services.victorialogs.extraOptions` | `list of string` | Extra options to pass to VictoriaLogs. See {command}`victoria-logs -help` for possible options. |
| `services.victorialogs.listenAddress` | `string` | TCP address to listen for incoming http requests. |
| `services.victorialogs.package` | `package` | The victorialogs package to use. |
| `services.victorialogs.stateDir` | `string` | Directory below `/var/lib` to store VictoriaLogs data. This directory will be created automatically using systemd's StateDirectory mechanism. |
